Diye Jalte Hai Phool Khilte Hai

Jab Dard Nahin Tha (Na Hansna

Munna Bada Pyara Ammi Ka Dulara
Hat Ja Bajoo Nahin To Uda Doonga
Pyar Jab Na Diya Zindagi Ne Kabhi

Meri Jaan Meri Jaan Kehna Mano
Tum Ho Mere Dil Ki Dhadkan

Main Zindagi Ka Saath Nibhata 
Chala Gaya
Chand Mera Dil Chandni Ho Tum
Hum Bekhudi Mein Tum Ko Pukare
Tere Mere Sapne Ab Ek Rang Hain
Baar Baar Dekho Hazar Baar Dekho
Aajkal Tere Mere Pyar Ke Charche
Yahoo Chahe Mujhe Koi Junglee Kahen
Yeh Desh Hai Veer Jawanon Ka
Tu Is Tarah Se Mere Zindagi Main

Aaj Ki Raat Mere Dil Ki Salami Lele

Chhoo Lene Do Nazuk Honthon Ko

Koi Jab Raha (Meri Dosti Mera Pyar)

Rimjhim Ke Tarane Leke Aai Barsaat
Ek Tha Gul Aur Ek Thi Bulbul
Nahin Bhulegi Woh Barsat Ki Rat
Jane Kahan Mera Jigar Gaya Ji
Tum Jab Se Base More Nain
Yeh Duniya Agar Mil Bhi Jaye To

Thoda Ruk Jayegi To Tera Kya Jayega
Akele Akele Kahan Ja Rahe Ho
